abstract: 5:00 pm - Checkin & Networking 5:30 pm - Introductions & Welcome 5:45 pm - Talks Software-Defined AI Workforce: AI Workers vs. AI Agents byNikita Ivanov, Humatron AI, Founder & CEO Uber’s Multi-Agent Platform by Jamieson Leibovitch, Sr. Software Engineer, Uber Build Computer-Use Agent - from Research to Enterprise Applications by Ran Xu, Director of Applied AI Research, Salesforce 7:15 pm - Lightning / Community Talks Securing the AI Agent Workforce by Amean Asad of Lunal Control Agent Behavior with Rules by Sandi Besen of BeeAI by IBM 7:30 pm - Open Networking w/ Pizza and Sodas 8:30 pm - Close Talk Details Talk 1: Software-Defined AI Workforce: AI Workers vs. AI Agents Nikita Ivanov , Humatron AI, Founder & CEO The rapid rise of autonomous AI agents is reshaping how work gets done-but not all AI is created equal. This session unpacks the critical distinction between AI agents and AI workers in the emerging software-defined AI workforce. We’ll explore the "One Build - Many HIres" architecture, governance, and integration patterns. Attendees will gain a practical understanding of where AI agents fit, why AI workers matter for scaling, and how this paradigm shift mirrors the transition from apps to cloud-native platforms
